overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The scene transitions from a narrow sidewalk beside a concrete wall, across a busy intersection with elevated highways, and along a tree-lined street with massive holographic advertisements overhead. The lighting suggests early morning with long shadows and warm golden sunlight illuminating the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk beside tall concrete building with graffiti

events.description: character transitions from walking to a slight jog
approaching intersection, space opens up ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside a dark concrete wall covered in red graffiti, approaching an elevated highway ramp

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward camera
pedestrian in red pants walking away from camera

entered.detail: tall building wall with red graffiti markings and weathered texture
massive concrete highway structure with orange support beams spanning overhead
large illuminated digital billboard displaying colorful graphics on building facade
tall pole with orange accent lighting and traffic sensors attached

segments.scene_description: The segment follows a character with a mohawk hairstyle walking along a narrow sidewalk pressed against a tall concrete wall. The morning sun casts long shadows across the pavement as the character approaches a massive elevated highway ramp in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and futuristic vehicles pass by on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalks and traffic barriers

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk into wide open intersection with multiple crosswalks
white sedan and futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection as character crosses

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and crossing the wide intersection, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection
character wearing red vest with 'Toms Diner' logo walking ahead

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on asphalt
low concrete divider with vertical slits separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
tall dark building with reflective glass facade and multiple digital screens

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow sidewalk into a wide sunlit intersection dominated by an elevated highway ramp. The camera pans to follow the crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection. The space opens dramatically, revealing towering skyscrapers with digital billboards on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban sidewalk with commercial storefronts

events.description: following new character across intersection onto shaded sidewalk with tree canopy
passing piles of trash bags and debris on the sidewalk corner

agents.ego_description: following a bald man in a blue sleeveless denim shirt along a tree-lined sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and parked cars

notable_agents.action: bald man in blue denim vest walking steadily ahead
small child in yellow jacket walking alongside an adult

entered.detail: tall trees with dense green canopies creating dappled shade over the sidewalk
low concrete wall with decorative vertical openings separating walkway from building
multi-story building with large ground-floor windows and architectural details
enormous industrial structure with scaffolding visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to follow a different character across the intersection and onto a tree-lined sidewalk. Mature trees provide shade over the concrete path while parked futuristic vehicles line the street. The character walks past commercial storefronts on the left and a concrete barrier on the right, with trash bags visible at the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with mega-structures and holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward dramatically to reveal towering skyscrapers and floating holographic displays
passing under massive holographic advertisement projections with Japanese text

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at massive holographic advertisements and mega-buildings overhead, then returning gaze to street level

notable_agents.action: bald man in blue vest continuing to walk ahead toward the mega-structure

entered.detail: massive floating holographic display with Japanese characters and product imagery
enormous multi-level building with exposed scaffolding and industrial architecture
metal framework and construction platforms covering the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the awe-inspiring scale of the cyberpunk city, showing massive holographic advertisements floating above an industrial mega-structure in the distance. The character continues walking along the tree-lined sidewalk as the camera pans back down, with the elevated highway now visible to the left and commercial buildings passing by on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic urban corridor into a sprawling, sun-drenched cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by following a character with a mohawk along a narrow sidewalk pressed against a tall concrete wall, moving through long morning shadows toward a distant highway ramp. As the character emerges from the alley, the space opens dramatically into a wide, sunlit intersection where the camera pans across flowing traffic and towering skyscrapers adorned with digital billboards. The perspective then shifts to follow another character across the street and onto a shaded, tree-lined sidewalk flanked by commercial storefronts and parked futuristic vehicles. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal massive holographic advertisements floating above an industrial mega-structure before panning back down to the character walking past the elevated highway and city buildings.
